'''âd-p-d''' ('''kadapad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weekend|weekend]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weekend|weekend]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-p-d
|-
! Lemma
| kadapad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidapad|thidapad]] || [[word:jidapad|jidapad]] || [[word:shidapad|shidapad]] || [[word:kidapad|kidapad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudapad|thuthudapad]] || [[word:jujudapad|jujudapad]] || [[word:shushudapad|shushudapad]] || [[word:kukudapad|kukudapad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudapad|thudapad]] || [[word:judapad|judapad]] || [[word:shudapad|shudapad]] || [[word:kudapad|kudapad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudapad|thudapad]] || [[word:judapad|judapad]] || [[word:shudapad|shudapad]] || [[word:kudapad|kudapad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedapad|thedapad]] || [[word:jedapad|jedapad]] || [[word:shedapad|shedapad]] || [[word:kedapad|kedapad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodapad|thothodapad]] || [[word:jojodapad|jojodapad]] || [[word:shoshodapad|shoshodapad]] || [[word:kokodapad|kokodapad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodapad|thodapad]] || [[word:jodapad|jodapad]] || [[word:shodapad|shodapad]] || [[word:kodapad|kodapad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodapad|thodapad]] || [[word:jodapad|jodapad]] || [[word:shodapad|shodapad]] || [[word:kodapad|kodapad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdapad|thĂŠdapad]] || [[word:jĂŠdapad|jĂŠdapad]] || [[word:shĂŠdapad|shĂŠdapad]] || [[word:kĂŠdapad|kĂŠdapad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadapad|thathadapad]] || [[word:jajadapad|jajadapad]] || [[word:shashadapad|shashadapad]] || [[word:kakadapad|kakadapad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadapad|thadapad]] || [[word:jadapad|jadapad]] || [[word:shadapad|shadapad]] || [[word:kadapad|kadapad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadapad|thadapad]] || [[word:jadapad|jadapad]] || [[word:shadapad|shadapad]] || [[word:kadapad|kadapad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadapad|shadapad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadapad|goshadapad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadapad|gokishadapad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadapadnĂŒ|shadapadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadapadnknĂŒ|goshadapadnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapadnĂŒ|gokishadapadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadapadshĂ«|shadapadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadapadnkshĂ«|goshadapadnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadapadshĂ«|gokishadapadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapadro|shadapadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapadnkro|goshadapadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapadro|gokishadapadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapadmu|shadapadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapadnkmu|goshadapadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapadmu|gokishadapadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadapadsher|shadapadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadapadnksher|goshadapadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadapadsher|gokishadapadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadapadng|shadapadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadapadnkng|goshadapadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadapadng|gokishadapadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadapadya|shadapadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadapadnkya|goshadapadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadapadya|gokishadapadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadapadyam|shadapadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadapadnkyam|goshadapadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadapadyam|gokishadapadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadapadnĂŒshĂ«|shadapadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadapadnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadapadnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadapadnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadapadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapadnĂŒro|shadapadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapadnknĂŒro|goshadapadnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapadnĂŒro|gokishadapadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapadnĂŒmu|shadapadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapadnknĂŒmu|goshadapadnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapadnĂŒmu|gokishadapadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadapadshĂ«nĂŒ|shadapadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadapadnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadapadnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapadshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadapadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapadshĂ«ro|shadapadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapadnkshĂ«ro|goshadapadnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapadshĂ«ro|gokishadapadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapadshĂ«mu|shadapadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapadnkshĂ«mu|goshadapadnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapadshĂ«mu|gokishadapadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadapadronĂŒ|shadapadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadapadnkronĂŒ|goshadapadnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapadronĂŒ|gokishadapadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadapadroshĂ«|shadapadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadapadnkroshĂ«|goshadapadnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadapadroshĂ«|gokishadapadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapadromu|shadapadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapadnkromu|goshadapadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapadromu|gokishadapadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadapadmunĂŒ|shadapadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadapadnkmunĂŒ|goshadapadnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapadmunĂŒ|gokishadapadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadapadmushĂ«|shadapadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadapadnkmushĂ«|goshadapadnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadapadmushĂ«|gokishadapadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapadmuro|shadapadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapadnkmuro|goshadapadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapadmuro|gokishadapadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
